name: Glazed Carrot Coins
recipeIngredient: 12 medium carrots, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the carrots in a small amount of water until crisp-tender. Drain.
2. Remove and keep the carrots warm.
3. In the same pan, heat the brown sugar and butter until bubbly. Stir in the lemon peel.
4. Return the carrots to the pan; cook and stir over low heat for 10-15 minutes or until glazed.
5. Remove from the heat. Stir in the vanilla.
